figures.title: Multi-Stage Trust Evaluation Pipeline
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 2 - Multi-Stage Trust Evaluation Pipeline graph LR A200["200 - Divergence
Metric Input"] --> A202["202 - Bounded
Decay Function"] A202 --> A204["204 - Exponential
Moving Average"] A204 --> A206["206 - Neural Trust
Inference"] A206 --> A208["208 - Composite

Hysteresis"] A216 --> A218["218 - Signal
Assembly"] A218 --> A220["220 - Trust Value
Output"] A218 --> A222["222 - Operating
Mode Flags"] style A200 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A202 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A204 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A206 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A208 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A210 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A212 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A214 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A216 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A218 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A220 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A222 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px

figures.title: Operating Mode State Machine
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 4 - Operating Mode State Machine
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> NominalMode
    NominalMode: 400 - Nominal Mode
    DegradedMode: 402 - Degraded Mode
    FailsafeMode: 404 - Failsafe Mode
    RecoveryDwell: 406 - Recovery Dwell
    NominalMode --> DegradedMode: Trust Below Degradation Threshold
    DegradedMode --> FailsafeMode: Trust Below Failsafe Threshold
    FailsafeMode --> RecoveryDwell: Trust Above Recovery Threshold
    RecoveryDwell --> DegradedMode: Dwell Period Complete
    DegradedMode --> NominalMode: Trust Above Nominal Threshold

figures.title: Authority Mapping - Monotonic Non-Increasing Function
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 5 - Authority Mapping graph LR A500["500 - Trust Value = 0.0"] --> A506["506 - Failsafe Zone
Failsafe Override"] A506 --> A512["512 - Failsafe
Threshold"] A512 --> A508["508 - Degraded Zone
Bounded Scaling"] A508 --> A514["514 - Degradation
Threshold"] A514 --> A510["510 - Nominal Zone
Full Authority"] A510 --> A502["502 - Trust Value = 1.0"] A504["504 - Monotonic
Non-Increasing Function"] style A500 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A502 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A504 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:1px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5 style A506 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A508 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A510 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A512 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A514 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px

figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 6 - Enforcement Adapter graph TD A600["600 - Control Command
from Controller"] --> A602["602 - Enforcement Adapter
Non-Bypassable"] subgraph Hierarchy["Constraint Severity Hierarchy"] A604["604 - Advisory
No Modification"] A606["606 - Bounded
Scaling"] A608["608 - Strict
Clamping"] A610["610 - Failsafe
Override"] A604 --> A606 --> A608 --> A610 end A602 --> Hierarchy Hierarchy --> A612["612 - Anti-Amplification
Check"] A612 --> A614["614 - Enforced
Control Command"] A612 --> A616["616 - Safety State
Record"] A614 --> A617["Actuator"] style A600 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A602 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A604 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A606 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A608 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A610 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A612 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A614 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A616 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A617 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style Hierarchy fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#000,stroke-width:1px

figures.title: Envelope Recovery State Machine
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 7 - Safety Envelope Recovery
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Inactive
    Inactive: 700 - Inactive State
    Unsafe: 702 - Unsafe State
    Recovering: 704 - Recovering State
    Inactive --> Unsafe: Safety Envelope Violation
    Unsafe --> Recovering: No Violation for One Step
    Recovering --> Inactive: Consecutive Safe Steps (706) Met
    Recovering --> Unsafe: New Violation (Counter Reset)

figures.mermaid_code:

Operating Domain"] A810 -->|Bound Violated| A814["814 - ODD Violation
Detected"] A814 --> A816["816 - Trust Forced
to Unsafe"] A816 --> A818["818 - Mode Transition
Triggered"] style A802 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A804 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A806 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A808 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A810 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A812 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A814 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A816 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A818 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style Bounds fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#000,stroke-width:1px

figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 9 - Tamper-Evident Audit Chain graph LR subgraph R0["900 - Safety State Record t=0"] A912a["912 - Divergence Metric"] A914a["914 - Trust Value"] A916a["916 - Permitted Authority"] A918a["918 - Commands"] end subgraph R1["902 - Safety State Record t=1"] A912b["Divergence Metric"] A914b["Trust Value"] A916b["Permitted Authority"] A918b["Commands"] end subgraph RN["904 - Safety State Record t=N"] A912c["Divergence Metric"] A914c["Trust Value"] A916c["Permitted Authority"] A918c["Commands"] end R0 --> A906a["906 - Cryptographic
Hash"] A906a -->|908 - Prior Hash| A906b["906 - Cryptographic
Hash"] R1 --> A906b A906b -->|908 - Prior Hash| A906c["906 - Cryptographic
Hash"] RN --> A906c A906c --> A910["910 - Root Hash"] style A906a fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A906b fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A906c fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A910 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style R0 fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#000,stroke-width:1px style R1 fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#000,stroke-width:1px style RN fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#000,stroke-width:1px
